mechanics.excerpt: Note that Titles above the 8 point level should be forbid- den t0 player characters unless the gamemaster really wants t0 deal with games on that level. Be aware that sovereignty over entire sectors of space can take the game way beyond the scope dealt with in tnis book- bestows the character with huge prestige among the Clans However. like noble title_ it is also an important responsibili- ty.
